__comment__: Committed Test262 subset. Rollout cadence tracked on issue #69. Promise added 2026-04-23 for interpreter only — compiledExcludeFolders holds it out of compile mode because several Promise tests hang on compile-mode cancellation: the runner's timeout token works for code that checks it, but pure CPU / microtask-chain loops in emitted IL never check it (same limitation as REPL Ctrl+C on tight loops). Needs a structural fix for compile-mode cooperative cancellation before compiled-Promise can join the subset.
